marketNote: HOT (Hofer Telekom) and BOB are Slovenia's two big discount MVNOs, undercutting the premium brands (Telekom Slovenije/Mobitel, A1, Telemach, T-2) with flat, no-contract prices; both lead on 'unlimited data + unlimited SLO calls/SMS from ~6-10 EUR', and their real revenue extras are speed upgrades (5G/LTE) and out-of-EU roaming, not the base plan.
_dataCaveats: Prices captured 2026-07-18 direct from hot.si and bob.si package pages. IMPORTANT correction to the seed brief: BOB is NOT Telekom Slovenije's brand - it runs on the A1 Slovenija network (bob.si states 'zanesljivo A1 omrezje'); it was historically a Mobitel/Telekom prepaid brand but has been an A1 property for years. HOT = Hofer Telekom, an MVNO (host network not asserted here). Exact per-plan EU roaming GB come from BOB's own text (rumeni 15,246 MB, zeleni 12,194 MB); HOT per-plan EU roaming allotments are governed by the EU fair-use formula and the full cenik PDF, so HOT euRoamingGB is left null with a note rather than guessed.

providers._note: hot.si/hot-paketi. Hybrid prepaid/postpaid, all no-contract, free plan switching, VoLTE + eSIM + basic 5G at no extra charge. Base speed capped 150/50 Mbit/s unless you buy the 5G+ add-on (EXTRA is the exception, includes 1000/200). Pricing is per 30 days.

plans.name: HoT MINI
keyFeatures: 1500 min + 1500 SMS/MMS to all SLO networks
plans.notes: Capped, not unlimited - suited to light users. EU roaming allotment per EU fair-use, see cenik.

plans.name: HoT MAXI
keyFeatures: unlimited min + SMS/MMS to all SLO networks
plans.notes: minutesSlo/sms marked null but are UNLIMITED to all SLO networks (schema has no 'unlimited minutes' flag). 'For active users'.

plans.name: HoT MEGA
keyFeatures: unlimited min + SMS/MMS to all SLO networks
plans.notes: 'neomejeno*' = unlimited subject to fair-use policy. Same 9.99 price as MAXI but unlimited data instead of 150 GB - flagged NAJBOLJE PRODAJAN (best selling).

plans.name: HoT EXTRA
keyFeatures: unlimited min + SMS/MMS to all SLO networks
higher EU roaming amounts + SLO->EU minutes included
plans.notes: Top consumer plan ('za najzahtevnejse'). Uniquely bundles the 1000/200 5G speed and SLO->EU minutes that other plans charge for.

plans.name: HoT GIGA neomejeni internet
keyFeatures: home/office internet over the mobile network

paidExtras.name: WiFi2Go komplet (modem + SIM + 1st month GIGA unlimited)

plans.notes: This is HOT's 'home internet' but it is mobile-network / 4G-5G based, NOT fixed line. Cheaper GIGA mini variant: 6.99 EUR for 30 GB data-only. A 9.99 EUR 'GIGA DVOJCEK' bundles unlimited-data GIGA with a MEGA/MINI/MAXI/EXTRA voice plan. HOT has NO fixed broadband and NO TV product.

providers._note: bob.si, runs on A1 Slovenija network. Mobile-only (voice plans + mobile-internet SIM + prepaid); NO fixed broadband, NO TV. All no-contract, free plan switching by SMS to 0680. Promo (new subscribers 15.7.-30.9.2026): rumeni & zeleni at 5.99 EUR/mo forever with e-invoice. Regular prices listed below. Base plans run on LTE; full 5G/1000 Mbit/s needs the paid LTE/5G add-on.

plans.name: rumeni bob
keyFeatures: unlimited data in SLO (150 GB at full 300/100 Mbit/s, then throttled to 2/1 Mbit/s)
unlimited MIN + SMS in SLO and EU/EEA
includedFree: unlimited SLO data (150 GB full speed)

paidExtras.name: bob LTE/5G option (raise speed to up to 1000 Mb/s, unlock 5G)
svet 1 GB (1 GB data outside EU/EEA, 10+ countries)

plans.notes: Promo 5.99 EUR/mo forever for new subscribers with e-invoice (regular 9.99). After 150 GB, speed drops to 2/1 Mbit/s but data keeps working free. LTE/5G add-on price not shown on this page (see options page).

plans.name: zeleni bob
keyFeatures: unlimited data in SLO (20 GB at full 150/50 Mbit/s, then 2/1 Mbit/s)
unlimited MIN + SMS in SLO and EU/EEA
includedFree: unlimited SLO data (20 GB full speed)

paidExtras.name: bob LTE/5G option (up to 1000 Mb/s, unlock 5G)

plans.notes: Promo 5.99 EUR/mo forever for new subscribers with e-invoice (regular 7.99).

plans.name: rdeci bob
keyFeatures: unlimited data in SLO (10 GB at full 150/50 Mbit/s, then 2/1 Mbit/s)
unlimited MIN + SMS in SLO only
includedFree: unlimited SLO data (10 GB full speed)

paidExtras.name: bob LTE/5G option (up to 1000 Mb/s, unlock 5G)

plans.notes: Slovenia-only plan: roaming and all foreign use disabled (svet 1 GB not available). Cheapest bob plan at 5.99 flat.

plans.name: bob 4 cente
keyFeatures: pay-per-use: 0.04 EUR per minute / SMS / MB in SLO and EU/EEA

paidExtras.name: everything is metered at 0.04 EUR per unit (min / SMS / MB)

plans.notes: Flat 4-cent-per-unit tariff for very low usage. monthlyEur set to 0 (no fixed fee); real cost is entirely usage-based.
